## Child Work (Tasks / Bugs / Spikes)

<!--
Three stages — keep them separate:

1. Overall Output is created, excluding most of the child work.

2. When planning the work, we sketch out its shape.
   Sketch child Work as TITLES, ESTIMATES and SHORT DESCRIPTION here first.
   Pair-plan the list with a peer BEFORE creating any detailed tickets.
   The sum of estimates gives you an idea of total task size.
   Make sure you consider QA, UAT and Release tickets if they are needed.
   A list is cheap to revise; a dozen half-written tickets are expensive to delete.

3. Only when it moves into in-progress are child tickets created (and likely replanned).
   Once the real tickets exist, delete this comment and link them below.
   The Output is "done" when all the linked tickets are.

See docs/handbook/development.md → "Pair-plan the child Work before
creating the tickets".
-->
